title: origanum × adonidis
intro: Origanum × majoricum, also known as Origanum × adonidis, is a hybrid of the Origanum majorana and Origanum virens plants, often referred to as a type of marjoram. This perennial herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral capabilities. The health benefits of Origanum × adonidis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Origanum × adonidis include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and relieve respiratory issues.
